results.title: Así reaccionó Shakira al triunfo de Colombia sobre República del Congo. Video
results.description: La clasificación de la Selección Colombia a la siguiente ronda del Mundial de 2026 también desató la euforia de la cantante barranquillera.

results.title: Canada falls 2-1 to Switzerland, advances to FIFA World Cup knockout round
results.description: VANCOUVER - A historic moment was tinged with disappointment for Canada at the FIFA World Cup.

results.title: EXEC: Wall Street Eyes Benefits and Risks in Nike’s CFO Changeover
results.description: Analysts were mixed on Nike Inc.'s news that CFO Matt Friend will step down as the company's EVP and CFO, and succeeded in August by Pfizer CFO David Denton. Several analysts also now believe Nike’s Investor Day set for this fall, will be postponed.

results.title: CP NewsAlert: Canada into FIFA World Cup knockout round despite loss to Switzerland
results.description: VANCOUVER - Canada is through to the knockout round of the FIFA World Cup despite falling 2-1 to Switzerland in their final game of the tournament’s group stage on Wednesday.
